TS2322.fix_hint: Type X is not assignable to type Y. Either widen the target type, narrow the source value, or update the union/interface to match the actual shape.

TS2339.fix_hint: Property does not exist on type. Either the property is missing from the interface, the variable is the wrong type, or you need a type guard.

TS2304.fix_hint: Cannot find name. Add the missing import or check for typos.

TS2345.fix_hint: Argument of type X is not assignable to parameter of type Y. Adjust the call site or relax the parameter type.

TS2554.fix_hint: Wrong number of arguments. Check function signature; consider optional parameters or default values.

TS2769.fix_hint: No overload matches this call. Inspect the overload list; commonly resolved by passing the correct discriminator or fixing argument shape.

TS7006.fix_hint: Parameter implicitly has an 'any' type. Add an explicit annotation or enable inference via context.

TS18048.fix_hint: Value is possibly undefined. Add a null/undefined guard or use the non-null assertion only when invariant is documented.

TS18047.fix_hint: Value is possibly null. Guard with a null check or use optional chaining.

TS2741.fix_hint: Property is missing in type but required. Provide the missing field or mark it optional in the target type.

TS2538.fix_hint: Type cannot be used as an index type. Constrain the key to string|number|symbol.

TS2786.fix_hint: Cannot be used as a JSX component. Check return type and named/default export shape.

TS2353.fix_hint: Object literal may only specify known properties. Remove the unexpected key or extend the target type.

TS2532.fix_hint: Object is possibly undefined. Use optional chaining or a guard before access.

TS2305.fix_hint: Module has no exported member. Check the import path and module exports.

TOOL_CRASH.fix_hint: The tool crashed before producing parseable output. See raw stderr for stack trace.

UNKNOWN_FAILURE.fix_hint: Tool exited non-zero with no parseable diagnostics. See raw stderr.
